name: YT Multistream Console
summary: Local desktop console for running multi-channel YouTube livestream jobs from local video files or Google Drive links.

distribution.publisher: GitHub Releases: local `pnpm release` with ephemeral GH_TOKEN (PAT), or Actions workflow "Release" (workflow_dispatch; uses repo GITHUB_TOKEN).
distribution.notes: Never commit tokens. Builds under release/nsis-web/ (.exe, .nsis.7z, latest.yml). See RELEASE.md Publish sections (aligned with GPM-Automation-Console).

health.note: Requires bundled FFmpeg and valid YouTube RTMP stream keys. Stream keys must stay masked in logs.

nextActions: Add stream profile templates for 720p, 1080p, and low bandwidth.
Add queue-level retry policy and auto-restart.
